title: patch report
description: Proposed fix for a finding. The patch field is a unified diff the analyst can apply with git apply against base_commit.

patch.description: Unified diff against HEAD (git diff HEAD output). The text that would be piped into `git apply` or `git am`.

rationale.description: Two or three sentences explaining what the guard is, why it blocks the trace, and what legitimate input still passes.

files_changed.description: Paths relative to the repo root that the patch touches.

base_commit.description: HEAD sha the patch applies cleanly against. Lets the analyst detect if they have rebased past the base and need to regenerate.

tests_added.description: True if the patch includes a regression test for the sink.

notes.description: Optional prose: a second sink you noticed, a style choice you were unsure of, a test you could not write.

error.description: Set only when the skill refused to produce a patch (missing finding_id, thin prose, architectural fix, already-fixed upstream, empty diff).
